name: UNX Energy Corp.
description: UNX Energy Corp. was a junior, independent oil and gas exploration and production company headquartered in Calgary, Alberta. The company focused primarily on the acquisition, exploration, and development of offshore oil and gas properties along the South Atlantic Margin, specifically within the Orange and Namib Basins of Namibia, Africa. UNX Energy Corp. held significant exploration rights covering over 51,000 square kilometers of prospective acreage. The company was listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol UNX before being acquired by HRT Participações em Petróleo S.A. in 2011.
